action.reasoning: Observation: 16 iterations spent, still no baseline eval. The core issue is that model.py's camera ray generation uses the wrong spherical convention (Convention B), causing ray-bbox mismatches in TripoSR's renderer. Convention A matches get_spherical_cameras exactly (diff=0.000000) but was never used in model.py. Analysis: I will write a focused test script that computes custom rays with Convention A, passes them as [H,W,3] per-view to model.renderer() exactly like TSR.render() does, and tests all 11 target views for one validation object. If this works, I can immediately build a clean model.py without monkey-patching, test predict.py end-to-end, and submit eval. Decision: Write test_final.py to validate Convention A per-view rendering. Also read config.yaml to check the correct fovy.

command_output.stdout:
cond_image_size: 512

image_tokenizer_cls: tsr.models.tokenizers.image.DINOSingleImageTokenizer
image_tokenizer:
  pretrained_model_name_or_path: "facebook/dino-vitb16"

tokenizer_cls: tsr.models.tokenizers.triplane.Triplane1DTokenizer
tokenizer:
  plane_size: 32
  num_channels: 1024

backbone_cls: tsr.models.transformer.transformer_1d.Transformer1D
backbone:
  in_channels: ${tokenizer.num_channels}
  num_attention_heads: 16
  attention_head_dim: 64
  num_layers: 16
  cross_attention_dim: 768

post_processor_cls: tsr.models.network_utils.TriplaneUpsampleNetwork
post_processor:
  in_channels: 1024
  out_channels: 40

decoder_cls: tsr.models.network_utils.NeRFMLP
decoder:
  in_channels: 120 # 3 * 40
  n_neurons: 64
  n_hidden_layers: 9
  activation: silu

renderer_cls: tsr.models.nerf_renderer.TriplaneNeRFRenderer
renderer:
  radius: 0.87 # slightly larger than 0.5 * sqrt(3)
  feature_reduction: concat
  density_activation: exp
  density_bias: -1.0
  num_samples_per_ray: 128---
